reason: The mockup perfectly addresses the design brief for the CSV upload interface and incorporates a dedicated Flood Control Check visualization to ensure daily message volume limits are managed. The composition is clean, using a structured 12-column bento-grid layout with strong group proximity (Gestalt) and fewer than 9 primary logical blocks (Miller's Law limit). Contrast ratios for main texts and active elements strictly conform to WCAG 2.1 AA. The mobile-responsive elements, like the bottom navigation bar, are also cleanly conceptualized.
concerns: The Spintax editing component itself is not visible on this screen; it is only referenced as a tab in the bottom navigation bar. An additional screen or inline interactive section for spintax templates should be designed in the next phase.
The progress bar in the CSV parsing status card is static in the mockup; transition logic or accessibility labels for assistive technologies should be specified during actual implementation.

The contrast of auxiliary metadata/headers (e.g., '.text-on-surface-variant' with '#45464d' color on a '#f7f9fb' background) may be close to the 4.5:1 minimum limit and should be verified with precise color meters.
